title: Chief Financial Officer
metaDescription: Chief Financial Officer role for SEA (Vietnam): lead the regional finance function, drive financial strategy, and ensure compliance across markets.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for an experienced Chief Financial Officer to join our team in SEA (Vietnam).
duties: Lead the finance function and drive financial strategy across the SEA region.
Oversee budgeting, forecasting, financial planning, and reporting.
Ensure compliance with statutory, tax, and regulatory requirements across markets.
Partner with leadership on growth, M&A, and capital allocation decisions.
Build and develop a high-performing regional finance team.
requirements: Degree in Accountancy or Finance; CPA / CA or an equivalent qualification.
12+ years of progressive finance experience, including senior leadership roles.
Strong regional experience across Southeast Asia, ideally Vietnam.
Excellent strategic, leadership, and stakeholder management skills.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
